_note: Status 'mapped' means the component has been mapped to this criterion internally. It does not mean the criterion has been verified by a formal external audit. Run audit-rules.json checks and update validation_status before changing overall_status.

criteria.title: Non-text Content
criteria.evidence: Checkmark and indeterminate-mark SVGs carry aria-hidden='true'. State is communicated by the native <input type='checkbox'> element. Icon-only checkbox controls must carry an accessible label on the input or wrapping label.

criteria.title: Info and Relationships
criteria.evidence: Native <input type='checkbox'> communicates role, name, and checked state to the accessibility tree without additional ARIA. Indeterminate state requires aria-checked='mixed' and input.indeterminate = true via JS.

criteria.title: Contrast (Minimum)
criteria.evidence: Primary checked: white icon (#FFF) on green (#1B8354) = ~5.27:1 (pass). Neutral checked: white icon on dark (#161616) = ~19.5:1 (pass). Unchecked border (#161616 on white) = ~19.5:1 (pass). Disabled (opacity 0.5) is exempt per WCAG 1.4.3 inactive UI exception. Read-only (opacity 0.7) is NOT exempt — deployment contrast must be verified.

criteria.title: Non-text Contrast
criteria.evidence: Unchecked border: inset shadow 1px #161616 on white = ~19.5:1 (pass). Focus ring: 2px #161616 on white = ~19.5:1 (pass). Checked background area: green #1B8354 adjacent to white page = ~5.27:1 (pass).

criteria.title: Keyboard
criteria.evidence: Native <input type='checkbox'> is keyboard operable by default (Space to toggle). Disabled removes from tab order. Read-only preserves tab order with aria-readonly='true'.

criteria.title: Focus Visible
criteria.evidence: Focus ring: absolute span, -4px offset, inset 2px box-shadow var(--checkbox-focus-ring-color). Activated by input:focus-visible. mix-blend-mode: multiply ensures ring visibility on various backgrounds.

criteria.title: Error Identification
criteria.evidence: Error/invalid state is absent from the manifest. Government forms require error indication. This is a known compliance gap. See analysis.md Missing Standards.

criteria.title: Name, Role, Value
criteria.evidence: Role: implicit from <input type='checkbox'>. Name: enforced by CHK-A11Y-001 (label required). Value: checked via input.checked; indeterminate via input.indeterminate + aria-checked='mixed'; disabled via input.disabled.

criteria.title: Component must use design tokens for all visual values
criteria.evidence: All color, radius, size, and opacity values in checkbox.css reference CSS custom properties. Hardcoded value detection enforced by CHK-TOKEN-001.

criteria.title: Native <input type='checkbox'> required for accessibility
criteria.evidence: The template pattern uses a visually hidden native input as the interactive element. The custom visual span is aria-hidden='true'. Enforced by CHK-STRUCT-001.

criteria.title: Minimum touch target 24×24px
criteria.evidence: Medium size (--md) is 24×24px. Small (--sm) is 20×20px. x-Small (--xs) is 16×16px. Touch target for small/xs must be handled by the form-field wrapper providing adequate spacing.

criteria.title: Indeterminate state must be set via JavaScript
criteria.evidence: HTML has no indeterminate attribute. Contract §4 documents the JS requirement (input.indeterminate = true) and the required aria-checked='mixed' companion attribute.

criteria.title: Arabic language font support
criteria.evidence: Checkbox has no text content. Typography is out of scope for this component. Font requirements apply at the form-field label level.

criteria.title: Focus indicator must not be suppressed
criteria.evidence: Focus ring implemented as .checkbox__focus-ring span activated by input:focus-visible. CHK-A11Y-004 checks for outline:none without replacement.

variant_compliance_notes.readonly: WCAG 1.4.3: opacity 0.7 reduces effective contrast. Read-only elements are NOT exempt from contrast requirements. Verify in deployment context.
variant_compliance_notes.disabled: WCAG 1.4.3: opacity 0.5 is intentionally low contrast. Inactive UI components are exempt per WCAG 1.4.3.
variant_compliance_notes.indeterminate: WCAG 4.1.2: aria-checked='mixed' must be set on the native input alongside input.indeterminate = true. The visual state alone is insufficient.
variant_compliance_notes.xs_size (16px): WCAG 2.5.5 Target Size (Enhanced, AAA): 16px is below the 44×44px AAA threshold. Meets AA minimum (24×24px) only if wrapped with adequate spacing in the form-field.
